achievements.actual_requirements: Pick up a potion from a brewing stand potion slot. An already-created potion placed and removed qualifies.

a suspicious stew. Another player must then pick up this suspicious stew.

achievements.actual_requirements: Throw a splash potion of weakness at a zombie villager and give it a golden apple (by facing the zombie and pressing the key with a golden apple in your hand).

achievements.actual_requirements: Make a banner using the thing banner pattern.

Visit all ocean biomes except the deep warm ocean/legacy frozen ocean (as they are unused).

achievements.actual_requirements: Be within a 100.9×100.9×103.5 cuboid centered on the Wither when it is spawned.

localized.ja_JP: はじまり。
ウィザーを倒す。

achievements.actual_requirements: Be within a 100.9×100.9×203.5 cuboid centered on the Wither when it drops the nether star.

localized.ja_JP: おしまい?
果ての世界を見つけよう。

achievements.actual_requirements: Enter a stronghold End Portal activated with all twelve eyes of ender.
Enter the end exit portal.

localized.en_US: Collect dragons breath in a glass bottle

achievements.actual_requirements: Have a dragon's breath bottle in your inventory.

localized.en_US: Levitate up 50 blocks from the attacks of a Shulker

achievements.actual_requirements: Ascend at least 50 blocks while under the levitation effect from a shulker.
achievements.rewards:
[[File:Elder Dragon Wings.png|60px]]
"Elder Dragon Wings" back item

localized.en_US: Use Elytra to fly through a 1 by 1 gap while moving faster than 40 m/s
Name a Shulker Box with an Anvil
Hit five mobs in the same Charge attack using the Spear.

achievements.actual_requirements: Armor stands and players also count for this achievement as they are technically mobs.
